description_long: This lamp is shaped like a stylized saguaro cactus, featuring a vibrant green body with white speckled patterns that mimic the natural texture of a cactus. The lamp has three main arms, with the central arm being the tallest and two shorter arms extending symmetrically from either side. Embedded in the front face are seven evenly spaced, round white bulbs that serve as the primary light sources, giving the lamp a playful and decorative appearance. The edges are outlined in a darker green, providing visual definition and a sense of depth. The base is flat and wide, ensuring stability when placed on a surface. The overall design is whimsical and eye-catching, making it suitable as a novelty accent piece in urban environments such as cafes, parks, or themed public spaces.
description: A green, cactus-shaped novelty lamp with white speckles and seven round bulbs embedded on its front face, standing on a flat base. Its playful design and vibrant colors make it a decorative accent for urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cactus shape, green color with white speckles, and seven round white bulbs arranged on the face.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the lamp's thin profile and the layered construction of the cactus form, with bulbs barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain green cactus shape with speckles, no bulbs or decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the lamp and the absence of visible bulbs.
